data.title: debug-everything session cleanup (lock release + epic notes) lost after context compaction
data.description: After context compaction during an extensive debug-everything session, the Phase 9 cleanup instructions (lock-release, epic closure/summary notes, discovery cleanup) are lost from context. This leaves stale session locks (requiring LOCK_STALE reclaim on next run) and stale Project Health Restoration epics without proper summary notes. Root cause: Phase 9/10/11 instructions are far from the active working context and get compacted away during long sessions. The graceful shutdown path (Phase 9 'On Graceful Shutdown') should be triggered by compaction events, but the compaction event itself causes the instructions to be unavailable. Potential fixes: (1) Add a compaction-resilient cleanup hook that runs lock-release and epic summary independently of skill context, (2) Move critical cleanup commands into a standalone script that can be invoked with minimal context, (3) Add lock TTL auto-expiry so stale locks self-heal without requiring LOCK_STALE reclaim.
